about.title:
The art of
handcrafted jewelry
about.p1: SophsCraft was born from a deep passion for the beauty of natural materials and artisanal craftsmanship. Each piece is thoughtfully designed and handcrafted with careful attention to detail and quality.
about.p2: We work with semi-precious stones, natural pearls and precious metals to create unique pieces that tell a story — yours.
about.p3: Wearing handcrafted jewelry means choosing authenticity and supporting conscious, sustainable human creation.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: A question, a special order, or just a hello? We reply within 24 hours.
contact.responseText: We reply to all messages within 24 hours, Monday to Friday.
contact.successText: We will reply within 24 hours to {email}.
contact.errorText: An error occurred. Please try again.

custom.title: Custom Order
custom.subtitle: Your jewelry, your story. Describe your vision and we will create a unique piece just for you.
custom.step1Desc: Describe your idea, the type of jewelry, materials, budget and occasion.
custom.step2Desc: We will send you a personalized proposal and quote within 48 hours.
custom.step3Desc: Your unique piece is handcrafted and carefully shipped.
custom.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your idea, desired style, colors, an inspiration…
custom.successText: We have received your request and will send you a personalized proposal within 48 hours at {email}.
custom.errorText: An error occurred. Please try again.

appointment.title: Appointment
appointment.subtitle: Come discover our creations, talk about your custom project, or simply share your passion for handcrafted jewelry.
appointment.why1: See and try on pieces in person
appointment.step1Desc: Select the day and time that suits you.
appointment.step2Desc: You will receive a confirmation by email.
appointment.step3Desc: In store or via video call, as you prefer.
appointment.ctaText: Contact us directly to arrange an appointment at your convenience.
